svg.title: Vantage system architecture overview
svg.desc: A Next.js app on Vercel with client and server layers, backed by Supabase for auth and data, external market data providers, and a dual-path AI analyst route.

g.text: Overview, Holdings, FX Lab, Charts, Analysis, Add/Import

svg.text: All five price providers feed SGD-converted figures back into holdings and FX Lab
